author: codex-agent

patch.value: Implements unresolved external report #3 delta beyond existing manage/health triage summaries by adding a single dedicated diagnostics surface.
Add a focused extension diagnostics command that consolidates activation, warning, and remediation data into summary and deep modes for faster triage.
A dedicated extension doctor command returns deterministic summary and deep diagnostics with normalized warning/error codes and remediation hints.
Triage currently requires manual correlation across extension --manage and health outputs.
Single diagnostics surface supports quick summary triage and deep machine-readable troubleshooting detail.
Diagnostics are fragmented across multiple command outputs.
Maintainers and agents can triage extension incidents faster with less output traversal.
